reviews.review_description: No idea how to play this but it’s really interesting. Will update this review as I progress through.

Don't waste your money or your time. The inputs are non-responsive so it's confusing just 'clicking around' on everything to try & get anything to respond so you can move forward on the game. I had to restart x2, it's so glitchy. It should still be free for feedback & testing. It's not intuitive. It doesn't make sense & I had higher expectations. Disappointing.
